title: I Built a YT Strategist AI Agent That Makes Me $6k?mo (free template n8n)

extracted.hook: Today I'm going to be showing you guys this AI system that I built that I actually use every single day.
extracted.credential_drop: "As always, I'm giving you all the resources that you need to set the system up completely for free. So, by the end of this video, you'll have this exact system running for you as a YouTube strategist." (late)

accelerate: discussing the AI system's benefits and how to set it up (0:00 - 1:30)
slow: explaining the process of scraping YouTube videos and analyzing titles and thumbnails (2:45 - 6:00)

extracted.vulnerability: "I knew that every once in a while I would go look at other channels in my niche. I would see what was performing well for them and then I would try to put my own spin on it"
extracted.cta: "if you want to download this template for free, all you got to do is go to my free school community. The link for that will be in the description and in the pinned comment"
